2026-03-03T19:48:32.4291594Z [36;1mmkdir -p "${HOME}/.local/bin"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4291883Z [36;1mcat > "${HOME}/.local/bin/python3.9" <<'SH'[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4292166Z [36;1m#!/usr/bin/env bash[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4292394Z [36;1mexec python "$@"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4292591Z [36;1mSH[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4292799Z [36;1mchmod +x "${HOME}/.local/bin/python3.9"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4293105Z [36;1mexport PATH="${HOME}/.local/bin:${PATH}"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4293363Z [36;1m[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4293604Z [36;1m# Determine local port from BACKEND_URL if provided.[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4293939Z [36;1mBACKEND_PORT="$(python - <<'PY'[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4294415Z [36;1mimport os[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4294642Z [36;1mfrom urllib.parse import urlparse[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4295007Z [36;1murl = os.environ.get("BACKEND_URL", "http://localhost:8080")[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4295367Z [36;1mparsed = urlparse(url)[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4295608Z [36;1mprint(parsed.port or 8080)[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4296202Z [36;1mPY[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4296384Z [36;1m)"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4296540Z [36;1m[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4296960Z [36;1mnohup python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port "${BACKEND_PORT}" > "${RUNNER_TEMP}/backend.log" 2>&1 &[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4297493Z [36;1mecho $! > "${RUNNER_TEMP}/backend.pid"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4297758Z [36;1m[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4297932Z [36;1m# Wait for backend readiness.[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4298179Z [36;1mfor i in {1..45}; do[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4298546Z [36;1m  if curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${BACKEND_PORT}/openapi.json" > /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4298994Z [36;1m    echo "Backend is ready on port ${BACKEND_PORT}"[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4299284Z [36;1m    exit 0[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4299468Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4299633Z [36;1m  sleep 1[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4299814Z [36;1mdone[0m
2026-03-03T19:48:32.4299981Z [36;1m[0m

2026-03-03T19:48:42.5278511Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/ISA-PHM-Wizard/ISA-PHM-Wizard
